message:
refactor: eliminate non-null assertions with safer alternatives

Improves type safety across CAAM hooks and TOON client by replacing
non-null assertions (!) with proper null checks and local variable
extraction.

useCAAM.ts:
- Extract status filter to local const before filter callback
- Add explicit null check for mock profile with descriptive error
- Add guard for profile rotation to handle edge case of empty arrays

toon/index.ts:
- Use optional chaining with pattern match groups (?.[1])
- Extract firstLine before CSV parsing to enable null check
- Guard header access in CSV row construction loop

These changes eliminate potential runtime errors when TypeScript's
strict null checks are bypassed via assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
